accurate.why: All program descriptions, dollar amounts, and percentages match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the act extends FAA programs and aviation taxes from early March through May 10, 2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the act amends prior statutory expiration dates across multiple statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the obligation authority through September 30, 2024, and the 39% apportionment reduction condition.

effective_dates.why: Correctly identifies May 10, 2024, extension dates and the October-to-May period.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers AIP funding, apportionment methodology, FAA operations, facilities, R&D, EAS, aviation taxes, and counter-UAS extension.

concise.why: Covers major categories without exhaustively listing every individual program.

correct_entities.why: FAA, Airport and Airway Trust Fund, Essential Air Service, Department of Homeland Security correctly named.

correct_figures.why: AIP (~$2.04B), $3.35B annualized basis, 39% reduction, and other amounts match the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
